scenario.title: Requesting a Letter of Recommendation
scenario.description: You are applying for a graduate program in Environmental Science. You would like to ask Professor Thompson, whose course you excelled in last semester, to write a letter of recommendation for you. The deadline is in three weeks.
scenario.purpose: Request a letter of recommendation for graduate school
keyPoints: Mention the specific program and deadline
Reference your performance in their course
Offer to provide your resume or transcript
Express gratitude regardless of their decision

modelAnswer:
Dear Professor Thompson,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to respectfully ask if you would be willing to write a letter of recommendation for my application to the graduate program in Environmental Science at State University.

I thoroughly enjoyed and learned a great deal from your Advanced Ecology course last semester, in which I earned an A. Your insights into conservation policy greatly influenced my decision to pursue further study in this field.

The application deadline is March 15th. I would be happy to provide my resume, transcript, or any other materials that would assist you.

Thank you very much for considering my request.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

rubric.description: Clearly states the request and includes all key points.
Proper email format with greeting, body, and polite closing.
Formal, polite register appropriate for writing to a professor.
